name: MBIA INC
summary: MBIA Inc. is a Connecticut-based financial guarantee insurance holding company operating through subsidiaries National Public Finance Guarantee Corporation and MBIA Insurance Corporation. National provides unconditional and irrevocable financial guarantee insurance on U.S. public finance obligations, with $22.3 billion gross par outstanding as of December 31, 2025. MBIA Corp. covers international and structured finance markets with $2.1 billion gross par outstanding. Both subsidiaries are running off existing insured portfolios and are not writing new financial guarantee policies outside remediation activities.

products.name: Financial Guarantee Insurance (Public Finance)
products.description: Unconditional and irrevocable guarantees of principal, interest, or other amounts on insured public finance obligations when due, managed through National.

products.name: Financial Guarantee Insurance (International and Structured Finance)
products.description: Financial guarantee insurance for international and structured finance markets provided through MBIA Insurance Corporation and MBIA Mexico.

products.name: Support Services
products.description: MBIA Services Corporation provides surveillance, risk management, legal, accounting, treasury, and IT services to MBIA subsidiaries on a fee-for-service basis.
